topology_gap_findings.detail: Files span contracts + strategy + execution + data profiles. No digest profile in architecture/topology.yaml covers this Phase 0 multi-profile cross-cutting change.
topology_gap_findings.fix: Add zeus.phase0_pr3_pr6_decision_source_context profile to architecture/topology.yaml before production ADMITTED status is required.
topology_gap_findings.binding_yaml_update: Not yet applied. Needed before production code admission.

scaffold_findings.finding: Field map rows 1-3 (observation_time, provider_reported_time, observation_available_at) are labelled '(existing)' but grep confirms ZERO occurrences in DecisionSourceContext and ZERO codebase occurrences of provider_reported_time / observation_available_at. These are genuinely NEW fields.
scaffold_findings.impact: PR 3 must ADD all 3 fields to DecisionSourceContext before adding validators. The '(existing)' label refers to the conceptual domain (observation_instants_v2 table), not the Python type.
scaffold_findings.action_required: SCAFFOLD CRITIC CONFIRM: rows 1-3 need ADD_FIELD + validator, not validator-only.

scaffold_findings.finding: observation_instants_v2 schema has no columns matching observation_time/provider_reported_time/observation_available_at. Field map lists it as the storage table but no migration is specified.
scaffold_findings.action_required: SCAFFOLD CRITIC CONFIRM: DB migration for observation_instants_v2 out of scope for Phase 0?

scaffold_findings.finding: run_complete_time writer site: the observed_members >= 51 positive branch in ecmwf_open_data.py is not a single flip-point. The complete-run watermark needs derivation from source_run_completeness == 'COMPLETE'.
scaffold_findings.action_required: SCAFFOLD CRITIC CONFIRM: write site for run_complete_time.

scaffold_findings.finding: raw_orderbook_hash_transition_delta_ms requires prior-hash comparison. Prior hash storage site (likely cycle_runtime snapshot cache) not identified.
scaffold_findings.action_required: SCAFFOLD CRITIC CONFIRM: derivation site for hash transition delta before implementation.

notes: ULTRAPLAN E.2 expected admission_status=ADMITTED. Actual: advisory_only (no digest profile yet).
src/execution/executor.py added to file list during scaffold: required for zeus_submit_intent_time + venue_ack_time capture (field map rows 12-13 writer site).
No hard-stop files identified. src/execution/fill_tracker.py falls under src/execution/** but not flagged as hard-stop in this PR's governance (no era-dispatch or money-path concern).
LOC estimate: ~330 production + ~200 tests = ~530 total. Well within 1500 cap. Single PR confirmed.
B/27 non-collision verified: executable_market_snapshot_v2.py is read-only for B/36.
